title: Acianthera cryptantha
taxonomy: Acianthera cryptantha is classified within the plant family Orchidaceae, commonly known as the orchid family. This family comprises one of the largest and most diverse groups of flowering plants, with over 30,000 known species. Within the Orchidaceae family, Acianthera cryptantha is further classified into the subfamily Epidendroideae. The genus Acianthera, to which Acianthera cryptantha belongs, is a group of small to medium-sized epiphytic orchids. These plants are native to the tropical and subtropical regions of Central and South America.
